view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for resuming triggers from inbound message events is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for resuming triggers from inbound message events is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates that the workflow can resume upon receiving a customer reply, as detailed in the linked use case. The scenario explicitly states that the workflow waits for a reply and resumes when the customer replies, confirming the requirement is met. Additionally, prior step evidence shows successful interactions that align with the expected behavior of the workflow, particularly the 'customer.replied' event which is crucial for resuming the workflow.
